basicDetails.schemeName: Stipends to Students of NT/DNT Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Stipends to Students of NT/DNT Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote inclusive education by financially supporting students from economically weaker sections pursuing technical and vocational education after SSC. The initiative offers a stipend of ₹400 per month to aid the academic progress and reduce the dropout rate among underprivileged youth. The scheme is implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department. It specifically benefits those enrolled in professional or Government ITI courses and belonging to families with an annual income not exceeding ₹6,00,000/-.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Stipend:** A monthly stipend of ₹400/- is given to NT/DNT Caste students for one year of recognized professional and Government ITI courses.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme “Stipends to Students of NT/DNT Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat, supports education for NT/DNT Caste students by providing a monthly stipend for one year.

children.text: The scheme “Stipends to Students of NT/DNT Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote inclusive education by financially supporting students from economically weaker sections pursuing technical and vocational education after SSC. The initiative offers a stipend of ₹400 per month to aid the academic progress and reduce the dropout rate among underprivileged youth. The scheme is implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department. It specifically benefits those enrolled in professional or Government ITI courses and belonging to families with an annual income not exceeding ₹6,00,000/-.
A monthly stipend of ₹400/- is given to NT/DNT Caste students for one year of recognized professional and Government ITI courses.

applicationProcess.process_md: > **How to Register:** **Step 1:** Visit the Digital [Gujarat portal](http://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/). **Step 2:** The user should click on the "Click to register" option. Fill all details and click on "Save". > **How to Log In:** **Step 1:** Visit the Digital [Gujarat portal](http://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/). **Step 2:** The user should click on the "Login" option. **Step 3:** Enter all details and click on "Login". > **How to Apply for a New Service:** **Step 1:** After logging in, select the relevant department. **Step 2**: Choose the specific service to apply for within that department. **Step 3:** Fill out all required details in the application form. **Step 4:** Upload, attach, or browse necessary documents. Alternatively, import documents directly from DigiLocker. **Step 5:** Carefully review all entered information. **Step 6:** Submit the application. **Step 7:** Once the application is completed, proceed to payment to download the certificate. **Step 8:** Upon successful payment, the certificate will be available for download. > **Digital Gujarat (Help Desk)** Contact No : 18002335500

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat. 1. The applicant should belong to Nomadic Tribe and Denotified Tribe (NTDNT) communities. 1. The applicant should be a student who has passed the Secondary School Certificate (SSC) examination. 1. The applicant should be enrolled in a recognized professional or Government Industrial Training Institute (ITI) course. 1. The applicant’s individual and family income should not exceed ₹6,00,000/- per annum.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant should belong to Nomadic Tribe and Denotified Tribe (NTDNT) communities.
The applicant should be a student who has passed the Secondary School Certificate (SSC) examination.
The applicant should be enrolled in a recognized professional or Government Industrial Training Institute (ITI) course.
The applicant’s individual and family income should not exceed ₹6,00,000/- per annum.
